analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Latvian infectious disease expert urges vaccination, framed as "the way," with hashtags #GetTheVaccine and #StrongerTogether. There is no mention of the EU, its policies, unity, global role, or leadership. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU success story) – not referenced. EU2 (EU unity) – #StrongerTogether could imply solidarity but is generic and not tied to the EU; no explicit EU unity claim. EU3 (EU usefulness for citizens) – tweet promotes vaccination but does not attribute policies or benefits to the EU; no linkage to EU actions. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – not mentioned. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – not relevant. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – not mentioned. Conclusion: No listed EU narratives are promoted.
